raw_consumer_statement: My husband XXXX XXXX is the primary card holder but I accidently made a payment of {$10.00}, XXXX on XX/XX/year>. On the app on my phone I selected the full credit card payment instead of the minimum balance which I had intended. When I saw the amount pending on my bank account I called my bank - XXXX. They said that since I was so overdrawn, they would not process the amount. Then on XX/XX/year> I see in my account that I was charged the same amount again. I called CITI bank who said that they will keep trying to collect the money up to 4 times. I was told by them that there is no way they can stop the payment. This is outrageous. IN the meantime, I am being charged overdraft fees and I am unable to access the money that I have in my account until the pending charge gets reversed, They are saying that this will happen again on XX/XX/year>. I asked to speak to a manager and I was told that there was nothing anyone could do. I insisted to speak to a manager and was out on hold for 20 minutes and then the phone line was disconnected on their end.
